strategy: This is a 30,000-health Balance boss who punishes the standard blade-and-trap loop. Bring a hitter, supports who buff without over-blading, and a healer to cover his Scald.
He resists 33% to every school, so there is no easy weakness. Use a pierce-heavy hitter with an off-school or Spectral hit rather than fighting into resist.
Minimize blades and traps. Every blade you cast gives him a free Balanceblade, and every trap you cast puts an Elemental Trap on the caster.
Lean on auras, pierce, and shadow-enhanced damage instead of stacked charms and traps, since those two tools feed him or backfire.
When you do set up, blade and hit on the same turn so he gains only one counter-Balanceblade before he dies. Keep a heal ready for his Scald DoT.
cheatNotes: At the start of the fight he casts Power Play, a global that hands out extra pips - to both sides - so he ramps quickly.
If you cast a Trap, he retaliates with an Elemental Trap placed on you, the wizard who cast it.
If you cast a Blade, he gives himself a Balanceblade, growing his own hit.
He casts Scald, a Fire damage-over-time, on an unconfirmed trigger. Keep a Triage or heal available.
